---
title: "NL-PDDL"
subtitle: "Open-World Goal-Oriented Commonsense Regression Planning for Embodied AI"
---

::: {.lead}
**Natural Language PDDL (NL-PDDL)** extends symbolic PDDL into a flexible natural language representation, enabling open-world regression planning with LLM-based commonsense entailment.
:::

Published at **[ICLR 2026](https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10007784)**.

## Key Contributions

1. **NL-PDDL representation** -- extends symbolic PDDL into natural language, improving accessibility for non-expert users and generalization across modalities.
2. **Commonsense regression planning** -- generalizes regression-style planning to NL-PDDL with LLM-based entailment reasoning to handle goal--action specification misalignment in partially-observed environments.
3. **Efficient open-world reasoning** -- leverages lifted specifications to avoid exhaustive grounding, achieving time and space complexity independent of the number of ground objects, states, and actions.

## Results Highlights

| Domain | Success Rate |
|---|---|
| ALFWorld Text | 94% |
| ALFWorld Vision | 84% |
| Blocksworld | 70% |

NL-PDDL substantially outperforms existing baselines and is more robust to longer horizons and more complex goals.

## Links

- [Paper (OpenReview)](https://openreview.net/pdf?id=kWCNhRdcDI)
- [ICLR 2026 Poster](https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10007784)
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/D3Mlab/NL-PDDL)
- [Tutorial](tutorial.ipynb) -- step-by-step Blocksworld walkthrough
- [Interactive Tree Viewer Demo](viewer.qmd) -- explore a regression plan interactively

## Authors

Xiaotian Liu, Armin Toroghi, Jiazhou Liang, David Courtis, Ruiwen Li, Ali Pesaranghader, Jaehong Kim, Tanmana Sadhu, Hyejeong Jeon, Scott Sanner

University of Toronto

## Citation

Click the copy button to copy the BibTeX entry.

```bibtex
@inproceedings{
liu2026natural,
title={Natural Language {PDDL} ({NL}-{PDDL}) for Open-world Goal-oriented Commonsense Regression Planning in Embodied {AI}},
author={Xiaotian Liu and Armin Toroghi and Jiazhou Liang and David Courtis and Ruiwen Li and Ali Pesaranghader and Jaehong Kim and Tanmana Sadhu and Hyejeong Jeon and Scott Sanner},
booktitle={The Fourteenth International Conference on Learning Representations},
year={2026},
url={https://openreview.net/forum?id=kWCNhRdcDI}
}
```
